inputs.label: Abnormal Renal Function (dialysis, transplant, Cr>2.26mg/dL or >200µmol/L)
inputs.businessContext: Chronic dialysis, renal transplant, serum creatinine ≥2.26 mg/dL or ≥200 µmol/L

label_i18n.en: Abnormal Renal Function (dialysis, transplant, Cr>2.26mg/dL or >200µmol/L)
label_i18n.tr: Anormal Böbrek Fonksiyonu (diyaliz, transplant, Cr>2.26mg/dL veya >200µmol/L)
label_i18n.de: Abnormale Nierenfunktion (Dialyse, Transplantation, Cr>2,26 mg/dL oder >200 µmol/L)
label_i18n.fr: Fonction rénale anormale (dialyse, transplantation, Cr > 2,26 mg/dL ou > 200 µmol/L)
label_i18n.es: Función renal anormal (diálisis, trasplante, Cr >2.26 mg/dL o >200 µmol/L)
label_i18n.ar: Abnormal Renal Function (dialysis, transplant, Cr>2.26mg/dL or >200µmol/L)

businessContext_i18n.en: Chronic dialysis, renal transplant, serum creatinine ≥2.26 mg/dL or ≥200 µmol/L
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kronik diyaliz, böbrek nakli, serum kreatinin ≥2.26 mg/dL veya ≥200 µmol/L
businessContext_i18n.de: Chronische Dialyse, Nierentransplantation, Serumkreatinin ≥2,26 mg/dL oder ≥200 µmol/L
businessContext_i18n.fr: Dialyse chronique, transplantation rénale, créatinine sérique ≥ 2,26 mg/dL ou ≥ 200 µmol/L
businessContext_i18n.es: Diálisis crónica, trasplante renal, creatinina sérica ≥2.26 mg/dL o ≥200 µmol/L

inputs.label: Abnormal Liver Function (cirrhosis, bilirubin >2x ULN, AST/ALT/ALP >3x ULN)
inputs.businessContext: Chronic hepatic disease (cirrhosis) or biochemical evidence of significant hepatic derangement

label_i18n.en: Abnormal Liver Function (cirrhosis, bilirubin >2x ULN, AST/ALT/ALP >3x ULN)
label_i18n.tr: Anormal Karaciğer Fonksiyonu (siroz, bilirubin >2x ÜSN, AST/ALT/ALP >3x ÜSN)
label_i18n.de: Abnormale Leberfunktion (Zirrhose, Bilirubin >2x ULN, AST/ALT/ALP >3x ULN)
label_i18n.fr: Fonction hépatique anormale (cirrhose, bilirubine > 2x LSN, AST/ALT/ALP > 3x LSN)
label_i18n.es: Función hepática anormal (cirrosis, bilirrubina >2x LSN, AST/ALT/ALP >3x LSN)
label_i18n.ar: Abnormal Liver Function (cirrhosis, bilirubin >2x ULN, AST/ALT/ALP >3x ULN)

businessContext_i18n.en: Chronic hepatic disease (cirrhosis) or biochemical evidence of significant hepatic derangement
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kronik karaciğer hastalığı (siroz) veya önemli karaciğer bozukluğunun biyokimyasal kanıtı
businessContext_i18n.de: Chronische Lebererkrankung (Zirrhose) oder biochemische Hinweise auf eine signifikante Leberschädigung
businessContext_i18n.fr: Maladie hépatique chronique (cirrhose) ou preuve biochimique d'une altération hépatique significative
businessContext_i18n.es: Enfermedad hepática crónica (cirrosis) o evidencia bioquímica de alteración hepática significativa

inputs.label: Stroke History
inputs.businessContext: Previous stroke, transient ischemic attack, or thromboembolism

businessContext_i18n.en: Previous stroke, transient ischemic attack, or thromboembolism
businessContext_i18n.tr: Önceki inme, geçici iskemik atak veya tromboembolizm
businessContext_i18n.de: Früherer Schlaganfall, transitorische ischämische Attacke oder Thromboembolie
businessContext_i18n.fr: AVC antérieur, accident ischémique transitoire ou thromboembolie
businessContext_i18n.es: Accidente cerebrovascular previo, ataque isquémico transitorio o tromboembolismo

inputs.label: Bleeding History or Predisposition
inputs.businessContext: History of major bleeding or predisposition to bleeding (e.g., bleeding diathesis, anemia)

businessContext_i18n.en: History of major bleeding or predisposition to bleeding (e.g., bleeding diathesis, anemia)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Majör kanama öyküsü veya kanamaya yatkınlık (örn. kanama diyatezi, anemi)
businessContext_i18n.de: Vorgeschichte schwerer Blutungen oder Blutungsneigung (z. B. Blutungsdiathese, Anämie)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Antécédent de saignement majeur ou prédisposition au saignement (par ex., diathèse hémorragique, anémie)
businessContext_i18n.es: Antecedentes de sangrado mayor o predisposición al sangrado (p. ej., diátesis hemorrágica, anemia)

inputs.label: Labile INR (unstable/high, TTR <60%)
inputs.businessContext: Labile international normalized ratio (INR), unstable or high INRs, or poor time in therapeutic range (<60%)

businessContext_i18n.en: Labile international normalized ratio (INR), unstable or high INRs, or poor time in therapeutic range (<60%)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Değişken uluslararası normalleştirilmiş oran (INR), dengesiz veya yüksek INR'ler veya terapötik aralıkta zayıf süre (<%60)
businessContext_i18n.de: Labiler INR-Wert (International Normalized Ratio), instabile oder hohe INR-Werte oder schlechte Zeit im therapeutischen Bereich (<60%)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Rapport international normalisé (INR) labile, INR instables ou élevés, ou mauvais temps dans la plage thérapeutique (< 60 %)
businessContext_i18n.es: Índice internacional normalizado (INR) lábil, INR inestable o alto, o mal tiempo en rango terapéutico (<60%)

inputs.label: Drugs/Alcohol (antiplatelet agents, NSAIDs, alcohol abuse ≥8 drinks/week)
inputs.businessContext: Concomitant use of antiplatelet agents or non-steroidal anti-inflammatory drugs, or alcohol excess ≥8 drinks/week

label_i18n.en: Drugs/Alcohol (antiplatelet agents, NSAIDs, alcohol abuse ≥8 drinks/week)
label_i18n.tr: İlaçlar/Alkol (antiplatelet ajanlar, NSAID'ler, alkol kötüye kullanımı ≥8 içki/hafta)
label_i18n.es: Fármacos/alcohol (antiagregantes, AINEs, abuso de alcohol ≥8 bebidas/semana)
label_i18n.ar: Drugs/Alcohol (antiplatelet agents, NSAIDs, alcohol abuse ≥8 drinks/week)

businessContext_i18n.en: Concomitant use of antiplatelet agents or non-steroidal anti-inflammatory drugs, or alcohol excess ≥8 drinks/week
businessContext_i18n.tr: Antiplatelet ajanların veya non-steroid antiinflamatuar ilaçların eşzamanlı kullanımı veya aşırı alkol tüketimi ≥8 içki/hafta
businessContext_i18n.de: Gleichzeitige Einnahme von Thrombozytenaggregationshemmern oder nichtsteroidalen Antirheumatika (NSAR) oder übermäßiger Alkoholkonsum ≥8 Getränke/Woche
businessContext_i18n.fr: Utilisation concomitante d'antiplaquettaires ou d'anti-inflammatoires non stéroïdiens, ou excès d'alcool ≥ 8 verres/semaine
businessContext_i18n.es: Uso concomitante de antiagregantes o antiinflamatorios no esteroideos, o exceso de alcohol ≥8 bebidas/semana

formulas.totalScore: hypertension + abnormalRenal + abnormalLiver + stroke + bleeding + labileINR + elderly + drugsAlcohol
formulas.totalScore_aux: hypertension + abnormalRenal + abnormalLiver + stroke + bleeding + labileINR + elderly + drugsAlcohol
